artifact_chain.exact_chain: whole source repository -> rapp-cubby/1.0 -> rapp-application/1.0 -> deterministic Store ZIP + brainstem-egg/2.3-cubby -> verified isolated installed twin

actual_agent_manifest.policy: Actual agents and soul are newly authored and survive deterministic Store/egg/hatch round trips; catalogs are generated local metadata. Final public release attestation remains unresolved.

original_runtime_manifest.policy: Original runtime, protocol, imsg tooling/privacy scanner, and dependency-verification files; adapted bridge files are tracked separately in PROVENANCE.json.

packaging_implementation.archive_profile: single no-follow descriptor through verification and extraction
packaging_implementation.dependency_fetch: explicit external cache; exact locked URL/size/SHA; never execute
packaging_implementation.release_verification: canonical low-S P-256, exact assets/checksums/source binding
packaging_implementation.source_staging: immutable git archive for exact revisions

publication_scanner.candidate_gate: zero findings over exact source, every reachable Git ref/blob/tag, generated Pages, and release assets; signed candidate receipt is an asset
publication_scanner.final_gate: second zero-finding signed receipt over public redownload plus complete supplied Actions log archives
publication_scanner.history_release_requirement: real commit and complete reachable history; development without HEAD records not_available_development

runner.label: macos-15
runner.reproducibility_scope: Byte equality is asserted only for repeated builds on this locked runner image and toolchain.

toolchain.gh: recorded from locked runner image at runtime
toolchain.git: recorded from locked runner image at runtime
toolchain.zlib: recorded from locked CPython at runtime

verification_requirements: archive members are contained before extraction
helper contains x86_64, arm64, and arm64e
required executable, helper, and bundle files exist
strict Developer ID authority and Team ID match the lock

python.index_policy: one explicitly configured package index; no dependency links or mutable VCS references
python.sdist_policy: forbidden unless separately reviewed, pinned, hashed, and built in the attested builder

dependency_policy.transitive_dependencies: Every transitive package, artifact hash, license, and source commit must be locked before release.

determinism.array_order: as declared; pin arrays are ordered by id and artifact nodes by order
determinism.timestamps_in_build_artifacts: normalized from SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH derived from the final release commit

lock_status.reason: Offline source, packaging, exhaustive installed-byte inventory, publication scanner, and signed installed-byte attestation are implemented; exact public commit, signed candidate/final scan receipts, live owner proof, public redownload, and released Pages remain external gates.

controller_model.identity_rule: public product RAPPID is immutable; every installed/controller instance has a distinct private RAPPID
controller_model.internal_agent_rule: Actual internal *_agent.py sources remain actual agents inside the rapplication.
controller_model.lifecycle_recovery: exclusive-lock phase journals with stale PID/start-identity leases
controller_model.route: explicit controller-only deterministic RAPP_CONTROLLER_ROUTE/1.0 through POST /chat
controller_model.start_rule: exact preflighted model and signed-only child ingress are mandatory
controller_model.streaming_rule: Only the top-level controller agent streams.

imessage.account_policy: one enrolled owner account and one active writer
imessage.identifier_storage: local only; mode 0600 when file-backed or Keychain for secrets
imessage.transport: signed imsg JSON-RPC over supervised stdio

twin_chat.canonicalization: received signed wire bytes must already equal the project-owned bounded UTF-8 sorted-key compact JSON encoding; no floats; signed 64-bit integers; only top-level sig omitted

idempotency.controller_action_key: required for chat and self_test; exact signed request and terminal controller result persist privately
idempotency.duplicate_completed_request: return the previously journaled signed response
idempotency.timeout_retry: reuse exact request bytes and nonce; never re-sign

paired_transport_keys.private_key_storage: exact unencrypted BEGIN PRIVATE KEY PKCS8 PEM mode 0600 beneath explicit mode-0700 private state
paired_transport_keys.signature_encoding: canonical base64url without padding of fixed-width low-S IEEE P1363 r||s

rappid_binding: inner to_rappid equals the installed twin rappid for inbound requests
paired public key is bound locally to wrapper from
signed response swaps the bound from_rappid and to_rappid and cites the request nonce, digest, and current key epoch

replay_journal.crash_policy: expired pre-dispatch claims may be reclaimed; a dispatch marker becomes a signed terminal ambiguous rejection without redispatch
replay_journal.durability: SQLite WAL, synchronous FULL, owner lease and immediate claim transaction plus dispatch marker

wire.child_ingress: Controller-launched and adopted child ports are signed-only and reject plaintext before provider or tools.
wire.cors: disabled by default; if a bundled local UI requires CORS, use one exact loopback origin
wire.global_controller_ingress: The separately configured global controller accepts plain local control pending authenticated iMessage repair; loopback is not authentication.
wire.privileged_controls: Require a valid paired P-256 signature, exact rappid binding, replay acceptance, and an enumerated non-code-execution operation.

prohibited_surfaces.value: execution or import of code obtained from a branch, mutable URL, request body, message, or remote repository
LAN, wildcard, public, relay, or cloud listener in the v1 attested profile
shell, eval, arbitrary process execution, or unrestricted console semantics even when signed
auto-pip or any dependency installation during request handling
any unauthenticated route or message that changes agents, packages, files, configuration, identity, keys, memory policy, or process state

project.release_policy: The public repository may contain reviewed source and reproducible artifacts only; private runtime state is never a release input.

protocol_pins.role: normative messaging trust and iMessage profile reference
normative twin-chat envelope and signed relay-wrapper reference

runtime_pins.role: behavioral and license reference for the clean-room runtime; no source copied or adapted

source_pins.role: pinned signed macOS iMessage transport dependency
grail pointer and behavioral authority only

vendoring_policy.reason: The pinned root has no LICENSE; behavioral authority is not source permission.

source_pins.role: secondary implementation and initial iMessage reference only
secondary implementation and artifact-contract reference only

vendoring_policy.reason: Only directly owner-authored and separately reviewed material could ever be considered; third-party, forked, copied, generated, and differently licensed material remains excluded.

unresolved.required_value: immutable 40-hex commit for the released public tree
owner-only live enrollment plus published Pages/release asset and downloaded-byte equality proof
signed zero-finding candidate receipt included with prerelease, then a second signed zero-finding final receipt covering public redownload and completed Actions logs
passing public live-provider/iMessage supported-host receipt for the same publicly redownloaded arm64 macOS/Python 3.11 commit; offline local attestation is already implemented
